p58_phase: P58 — Monitoring Contract V2 Monthly Report Template

monthly_report_schema.description: Schema for a Monitoring Contract V2 monthly report. Separates global P52 status (threshold-driven) from band-level annotations (P57 BandAnnotationRecord, metadata only). Does not modify runtime logic or thresholds.
section_order: 1. GLOBAL STATUS — P52 V2 threshold evaluation
2. BAND ANNOTATIONS — Active carry-forward BandAnnotationRecord list
3. DATA GAP STATUS — 2024 closing-line gap and cross-year analysis status
5. LIMITATIONS — sample sizes, data gaps, schema caveats
monthly_report_schema.note: Band annotations are additive metadata. They must never change global_status, trigger refit, or change thresholds. See P57 SEP01-SEP06 separation rules.

global_status_section_schema.description: Global monitoring status driven exclusively by P52 V2 thresholds. Must never be modified by band-level annotations.

report_month.description: Month covered by this report, e.g. '2025-09'.

batch_n.description: Number of games in the Tier C batch for this month.

global_status.description: Overall monitoring status. Controlled only by P52 V2 thresholds. Must not be changed by band annotations.

global_alert_level.description: Traffic-light alert level based on P52 thresholds.

global_alert_reasons.description: List of reasons the current alert level was assigned.

edge_status.description: Edge rate status against P52 V2 thresholds.

calibration_status.description: Calibration (ECE) status against P52 V2 thresholds.

sample_status.description: Sample size status for the monthly Tier C batch. Shown separately from calibration and edge status.

data_gap_status.description: 2024 closing-line data gap. Must be shown as a cross-year limitation, not a 2025-only blocker.

raw_edge_mean.description: Mean raw edge across Tier C games for this month.

raw_edge_ci_low.description: Lower bound of 95% CI on raw edge mean.

raw_edge_ci_high.description: Upper bound of 95% CI on raw edge mean.

platt_ece.description: Platt-calibrated ECE for all Tier C games this month.

platt_brier.description: Platt-calibrated Brier score for Tier C games this month.

p52_thresholds_used.description: Snapshot of the P52 V2 thresholds applied in this report.

source_trace.description: Traceability to source JSON artifacts used to populate this section.

rules: global_status is controlled only by P52 V2 thresholds.
global_status must not be modified by band annotations.
sample_status must be displayed separately from calibration_status and edge_status.
data_gap_status must describe the 2024 cross-year limitation, not a 2025-only blocker.
p52_thresholds_used must reflect locked P52 V2 thresholds; not changed by P57 or P58.
platt_ece and platt_brier reflect Platt-calibrated values using locked P45 constants.

band_annotations_section_schema.description: Band-level diagnostic annotations using P57 BandAnnotationRecord schema. These records are metadata only. They do not affect global_status, trigger refit, or change P52 thresholds.
section_rules: Band annotations are metadata-only; they do not replace or override global_status.
TRACK_ONLY_NO_REFIT must remain the action for BAND_SAMPLE_INSUFFICIENT records.
should_change_global_status must be false for all band annotations.
should_trigger_refit must be false for all BAND_SAMPLE_INSUFFICIENT records.
should_change_thresholds must be false for all band annotations.
Each record must include source_trace with p55_reference and p56_reference.
Section header must explicitly state: 'Band annotations do not change global P52 status.'
Section must state whether any record has should_trigger_refit=true (expected: none).
Section must state the current count of active TRACK_ONLY records.
band_annotations_section_schema.carry_forward_policy: An annotation with carry_forward_status=ACTIVE_TRACK_ONLY must appear in every subsequent monthly report until archival criteria are met (see P57).

sep_2025_example_report.example_note: This is a diagnostic example only and does not modify runtime behavior. Values are sourced from P55/P56/P57 artifacts. A real monthly report would populate raw_edge_mean, platt_ece, platt_brier from the actual batch data for that month.

global_status.batch_note: 535 is the full 2025 Tier C count. Sep-specific batch n would be a subset in a real monthly report; this example uses 2025 total for illustration.
global_alert_reasons: No P52 V2 global thresholds exceeded.
Sep mid-band anomaly is BAND_SAMPLE_INSUFFICIENT and does not trigger global alert.
global_status.data_gap_status: 2024 closing-line data gap (P43_BLOCKED_BY_DATA_GAP) remains unresolved. Cross-year analysis cannot be completed. This is a cross-year limitation, not a 2025-only blocker.

p52_thresholds_used.note: Exact P52 V2 thresholds are defined in p52_monitoring_contract_v2_summary.json. They are not reproduced here to avoid duplication.

band_annotations.section_header: Band annotations do not change global P52 status.

data_gap_status.impact: Cross-year band analysis is not possible until 2024 historical odds data is obtained. The Sep 2025 mid-band finding applies to 2025 data only.

validation_rules.description: Validation rules that any agent generating or reviewing a monthly Monitoring Contract V2 report must verify.

rules.rule: global_status must not be MONITORING_ALERT_DIAGNOSTIC unless a P52 V2 threshold is explicitly triggered.
rules.check: report['global_status']['global_status'] != 'MONITORING_ALERT_DIAGNOSTIC' OR alert_reason references P52 threshold.

rules.rule: No band annotation may set should_change_global_status=true.
rules.check: all(r['should_change_global_status'] is False for r in band_annotations['records'])

rules.rule: No band annotation with n < 30 may set should_trigger_refit=true.
rules.check: all(r['should_trigger_refit'] is False for r in band_annotations['records'] if r['band_n'] < 30)

rules.rule: No band annotation may set should_change_thresholds=true.
rules.check: all(r['should_change_thresholds'] is False for r in band_annotations['records'])

rules.rule: ACTIVE_TRACK_ONLY records from prior months must appear in the current report until archival criteria are met.
rules.check: All carry_forward_status=ACTIVE_TRACK_ONLY records from prior report are present.

rules.rule: band_annotations section header must explicitly state 'Band annotations do not change global P52 status.'
p52_thresholds_used must match the locked P52 V2 thresholds; not changed by any annotation.
data_gap_status must describe the 2024 cross-year limitation (not a 2025-only blocker).
rules.check: data_gap_status contains '2024' and does not claim 2025 is fully unaffected.

rules.rule: sample_status must be a separate field from calibration_status and edge_status.
rules.check: All three fields exist and are separate string fields.

rules.rule: governance_summary must include paper_only=true, live_api_calls=0, promotion_freeze=true, kelly_deploy_allowed=false.
rules.check: All four governance flags are present and match expected values.

invariants.description: Invariants for the Monitoring Contract V2 Monthly Report Template.
invariants: Band annotations are additive metadata; they never replace or override global_status.
P52 thresholds are never changed by a band annotation (should_change_thresholds must always be False).
An ACTIVE_TRACK_ONLY record carries forward to every subsequent monthly report until archived.
data_gap_status must always reflect the 2024 cross-year limitation.
Governance flags (paper_only, live_api_calls=0, promotion_freeze) must be present in every report.
platt_ece and platt_brier are computed using locked P45 Platt constants (A=0.435432, B=0.245464).
The Sep 2025 1.00-1.25 band annotation (n=27) must remain TRACK_ONLY_NO_REFIT until FE01+FE02 are met.

future_agent_usage_notes.description: How future agents should use the P58 monthly report template.

usage_steps.action: Load the P58 template (this JSON) and the current P52 V2 artifact.
Populate global_status from the current month's Tier C batch data.
usage_steps.note: Compute global_status using P52 V2 thresholds only. Do not let band annotations influence this field.

usage_steps.action: Carry forward all ACTIVE_TRACK_ONLY BandAnnotationRecords from the previous report.
usage_steps.note: Update repeated_month_count and cumulative_band_n for each record.

usage_steps.action: Add new BandAnnotationRecords if new band anomalies are detected this month.
usage_steps.note: Apply P56 sample tier policy to assign sample_tier, annotation, and action.

usage_steps.action: Run VAL01-VAL10 validation rules on the generated report JSON.
usage_steps.note: A report that fails any VAL rule must not be committed as a final artifact.

usage_steps.action: Generate the Markdown report from the JSON (GLOBAL STATUS + BAND ANNOTATIONS sections).
usage_steps.note: The Markdown must explicitly separate the two sections and label band annotations as metadata.

usage_steps.action: Confirm governance flags in the generated report match required values.

forbidden_agent_actions: Setting should_change_global_status=true in any band annotation.
Setting should_trigger_refit=true for a record with n < 30.
Setting should_change_thresholds=true in any band annotation.
Modifying P52 V2 thresholds based on band-level evidence alone.
Triggering Platt refit from monthly report without explicit authorization.
Removing the 2024 data gap note from data_gap_status.
Enabling kelly_deploy_allowed (must remain False at all times).
future_agent_usage_notes.graduation_reminder: A BAND_SAMPLE_INSUFFICIENT record (n < 30) graduates to FLAG_FOR_FOLLOW_UP when n >= 30 in a subsequent month AND repeated_month_count >= 2. See P57 for full graduation and archival criteria.
